clinical_history: 29-yr-old man with chest pain/dyspnea. Diagnosis is still possible despite the artifact.
diagnosis: Pericarditis with effusion and possible tamponade. There is diffuse ST elevation with slight PR deviation (see V3). In addition, note resting sinus tachycardia and borderline low voltage, c/w hemodynamic compromise. Patient went to OR for pericardial drainage procedure!
